title: Heterogeneous LLM Methods for Ontology Learning (Few-Shot Prompting, Ensemble Typing, and Attention-Based Taxonomies)

tasks.name: Task A: Text2Onto
tasks.description: Joint extraction of terms (A1) and their types (A2) from raw domain documents

tasks.name: Task B: Term Typing
tasks.description: Assigning types to given terms, evaluated in both few-shot (B1-B3) and zero-shot (B4-B6) settings

methods.few_shot: Uses RAG scheme with few-shot prompting
methods.zero_shot: Uses zero-shot classifier combining cosine similarity scores from multiple embedding models with confidence-based weighting

tasks.name: Task C: Taxonomy Discovery
tasks.description: Models taxonomy discovery as graph inference

methods.approach: Uses embeddings of type labels and trains a lightweight cross-attention layer to predict is-a relations by approximating a soft adjacency matrix

approach: Modular, lightweight, and scalable system for ontology learning across heterogeneous domains
